description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Bingo-Elastic CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: one for running tests on bingo-elastic python with multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9) and another for running tests on bingo-elastic java with JDK 1.8. For the python job, install poetry, dependencies, run pylint, set up elasticsearch, wait for it to be ready, and then run tests. For the java job, set up JDK 1.8, cache Maven packages, build indigo, indigo java api, bingo-nosql, and bingo-elastic.
